content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges provided, we can scan each edge and collect the time t whenever node u and node v match the two queried nodes (in either order).

First, we will check when node 0 and node 2 are first connected. We can see that there is an edge (0, 2, 2), so we have t = 2.

Next, we will check when node 7 and node 2 are first connected. We can see that there is an edge (7, 2, 19), so we have t = 19.

Therefore, the answer to the question is:

Answer: 19
